title: Yjs over Automerge for data-layer CRDT
rationale: Yjs wins on perf (frequent small mutations, 100-10k features), deeper plugin ecosystem (y-websocket, y-indexeddb, y-protocols), production convergence (TipTap, BlockNote, Hocuspocus). Automerge has cleaner semantics but ~200KB bundle and per-op cost unearned at this scale. GeoJSON FeatureCollection becomes a snapshot projection of Yjs doc, not source of truth.

title: Felt importer is read-only API-only GeoJSON snapshot — no binary container
rationale: Felt has no binary container format. Importer calls public API export, maps to .atlasdraw layer model. Import-only, no round-trip, no sync. Permissive: log warnings on unknown feature types, never throw. 'Read your Felt files' is the key migration narrative unlock for Show HN.

description: togeojson package deprecated. @mapbox/togeojson ^0.16.2 is the maintained fork.
geojsonhint package archived. @placemarkio/check-geojson is the maintained replacement for GeoJSON validation.

FSA (File System Access API) assumed as primary persistence path — wrong. FSA is Chromium-only. IndexedDB binary blob is the primary path for Firefox/Safari (~30-40% users). Plans assuming FSA as default exclude a third of users.
resolution: IndexedDB is primary path. FSA is opt-in enhancement for Chromium. Both paths must be tested in browser matrix.
